question: How can I check my order status?
answer: Go to My Orders and select the order to view real-time status updates such as pending confirmed in transit or completed.

question: Why is my order still waiting for seller confirmation?
answer: For second-hand items each order needs seller confirmation. Most sellers respond within 12 hours.

question: Can I cancel an order before pickup?
answer: Yes you can cancel before the item is handed over to campus courier or marked ready for pickup.

question: My order shows completed but I have not received the item. What should I do?
answer: Please contact support within 24 hours. We will pause payout and investigate with delivery and seller records.

question: What does ready for pickup mean?
answer: It means the seller has dropped off the item and you can collect it at the selected campus pickup point.

question: Do you support campus pickup and dorm delivery?
answer: Yes. You can choose self pickup at campus stations or dorm delivery where available.

question: How long does campus delivery take?
answer: Most campus deliveries arrive within the same day or next business day depending on distance and courier load.

question: How much is the shipping fee for second-hand items?
answer: Shipping fee is calculated by item size weight and delivery method and shown before payment.

question: Can I track the package after the seller ships it?
answer: Yes. A tracking number appears in your order details once the item is handed to the courier.

question: Can I return an item if it is not as described?
answer: Yes. You can request return within 48 hours of receipt with photos and issue details.

question: What if the item is damaged when I receive it?
answer: Report the issue within 24 hours and upload clear photos. Priority refund or return handling will be started.

question: How long does a refund take after approval?
answer: Refunds are usually completed within 3 to 5 business days after return verification.

question: Who pays return shipping for disputed items?
answer: If the claim is valid seller pays return shipping. If not valid buyer may need to cover return cost.

question: What can I do if the seller rejects my return request?
answer: You can escalate to platform review. Our team will decide based on chat records photos and listing details.

question: What payment methods are supported?
answer: We support Alipay WeChat Pay major bank cards and selected campus wallet channels.

question: Is my payment protected until I receive the item?
answer: Yes. Payment is held by the platform and released to the seller after successful delivery confirmation.

question: Why did my payment fail?
answer: Payment can fail due to balance limits bank risk control or incorrect account details. Please retry or switch method.

question: Can I get a transaction receipt?
answer: Yes. You can download an electronic transaction receipt from order details after payment succeeds.

question: How can I contact a human support agent?
answer: Type human support in chat and provide your order number and issue summary to get manual assistance.

question: What are human support working hours?
answer: Human support is available from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM every day including most holidays.

question: When should I request urgent escalation?
answer: Please request urgent escalation for safety risks suspected fraud or high-value item disputes.

question: What information should I provide to speed up help?
answer: Please share order number item link screenshots and a short timeline of what happened for faster resolution.

question: Do you offer student discounts?
answer: Yes. Verified students can receive periodic coupons during campus events and seasonal promotions.

question: How do I use a promotion code?
answer: Enter the code at checkout and confirm the discount is applied before completing payment.

question: Why is my coupon not working?
answer: Coupons may fail due to expiry minimum spend category limits or first-time-user requirements.

question: Can I combine multiple discounts in one order?
answer: Usually only one platform coupon can be used per order unless a campaign rule states otherwise.

question: How do I know if an item is still available?
answer: If the listing shows available and the Buy button is active the item is still open for purchase.

question: Can I reserve an item before paying?
answer: Some sellers allow short reservations. Use chat to request hold time and wait for seller confirmation.

question: Will sold-out items be restocked?
answer: As a second-hand marketplace most items are unique. Similar items may appear from other sellers later.

question: What do item condition labels mean?
answer: Condition labels such as Like New Good and Acceptable indicate wear level and are defined in each listing guide.
